  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The request to 'Polish this' targets sentence-level grammar, clarity, concision, and flow without changing content.",
    "RX.1": "While polishing, preserve legitimate hedging and avoid introducing unwarranted certainty.",
    "RX.2": "Edits should not intensify or broaden the claims beyond the authors’ original intent.",
    "RX.3": "Limit work strictly to stylistic improvements and refrain from restructuring or altering substantive content.",
    "RX.4": "Avoid edits that could inadvertently misstate methods or data in ways that could lead to misuse or misinterpretation.",
    "RX.5": "Retain original technical details, figures, and units so changes remain traceable to the source text."
  }
}

rationale.R1.6: The request to 'Polish this' targets sentence-level grammar, clarity, concision, and flow without changing content.
rationale.RX.1: While polishing, preserve legitimate hedging and avoid introducing unwarranted certainty.
rationale.RX.2: Edits should not intensify or broaden the claims beyond the authors’ original intent.
rationale.RX.3: Limit work strictly to stylistic improvements and refrain from restructuring or altering substantive content.
rationale.RX.4: Avoid edits that could inadvertently misstate methods or data in ways that could lead to misuse or misinterpretation.
rationale.RX.5: Retain original technical details, figures, and units so changes remain traceable to the source text.
